Thanks for your interest in the WIC program. Please be aware that only local WIC Agency staff can determine for certain if you qualify for WIC services.
Let's begin!
Eligibility:
Click on the answer that best describes your situation:
I am currently receiving or pending receiving Medi-Cal, Food Stamps/SNAP, TANF, FDPIR
I am currently enrolled on WIC from another county or state
None of the above
Please continue to fill out the application form.

Eligibility:
Please review the following chart then choose the option right below that best describes your family and income. Please note: There are some exceptions to the standard income guidelines that may qualify you for WIC benefits. If your income is slightly above the guidelines. There may be some exceptions that may allow you to qualify.
Please contact the WIC staff
or give us a call at:
855-RIV-HERO
(855-748-4376)
Number of persons in Family Unit*: Unborn children should be counted in family total. Example: Pregnant woman with a single unborn child are counted as two (2) in family unit. Pregnant woman with two unborn children (twins) are counted as three (3). Hourly**: Decimals are rounded up to the nearest dollar/cent.
Please continue to fill out the application form.
